{"fixed_xml":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ADVERTISING_ITEM>
    <SELLER>
        <NAME>Bey Hrn. Daniel Haag dem Buchbinder</NAME>
    </SELLER>
    <BOOKS>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Frischens Harpfen Davids</TITLE>
            <AUTHOR>Unbekannt</AUTHOR>
            <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
            <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME>
            <PRICE>fl. 2. 30. xr.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Stähelins</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Predigten</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
            <PRICE>48. xr.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Sammlung auserlesener Cantzel-Reden</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
            <VOLUME>Erster Theil</VOLUME>
            <PRICE>56. xr.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Bonds</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Satyrische Gedichte</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
            <PRICE>18. xr.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Bonds</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Brieffe</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
            <PRICE>9. xr.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Tempe Helveticg</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
            <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME>
            <PRICE>fl. 6.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Alardins</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Geistlicher Thee-Brauch</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
            <PRICE>4. xr.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Nachricht von Joh. Bossarten</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT>
            <PRICE>6. xr.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Altmanns</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>heilige Reden</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
            <VOLUME>1ter Tom.</VOLUME>
            <PRICE>30. xr.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Fischers</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Anmerckungen</TITLE>
            <VOLUME>6. Stück complet</VOLUME>
            <PRICE>fl. 1.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Brachmann</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>complet</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
            <PRICE>fl. 1. 30. xr.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
    </BOOKS>
    <BOUND_BOOKS>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Fabri</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Lexicon</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
            <PRICE>9. Pfund.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Scriptores-Helvetici</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
            <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME>
            <PRICE>3. Pfund 10. ü.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Simlers</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Regiment der Eydgenössischen Eidgenossenschaft</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
            <PRICE>1. Pfund 17. ü.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Valerius Maro Amstelaeus</TITLE>
            <PRICE>18. ü.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Novum Testamentum Graece</TITLE>
            <PRICE>2. Pfund.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Homerus: Ilias & Odyssee</TITLE>
            <PRICE>12. 2. Pfund.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Judas der Erzschalke</TITLE>
            <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
            <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME>
            <PRICE>4. Pf.</PRICE>
        </BOOK>
    </BOUND_BOOKS>
</ADVERTISING_ITEM>","number_of_corrections":15,"explanation":"1. Added XML declaration and root element `<ADVERTISING_ITEM>` to ensure proper XML structure.
2. Fixed the faulty tag `<PRICE>` to `<PRICE>` in the 4th book entry.
3. Corrected the formatting of the `<FORMAT>` tags to standardize abbreviations (e.g., '4t' to '4to').
4. Added missing `<AUTHOR>` tag for the first book entry.
5. Added missing `<SELLER>` section to include the seller's name.
6. Added missing `<BOOKS>` and `<BOUND_BOOKS>` sections to categorize books.
7. Corrected the special characters (e.g., 'ü' and 'ü' to 'ü' and 'ü').
8. Corrected the title 'Valer. Mar-' to 'Valerius Maro Amstelaeus'.
9. Corrected the title 'Homen Hias & Odyfl.' to 'Homerus: Ilias & Odyssee'.
10. Corrected 'VOLUME' tag for the 6th book entry to '6. Stück complet'.
11. Corrected 'VOLUME' tag for the 13th book entry to '4. Tom.'
12. Corrected 'VOLUME' tag for the 14th book entry to '2. Tom.'
13. Corrected 'VOLUME' tag for the 15th book entry to '1ter Tom.'
14. Standardized the abbreviations in the `<FORMAT>` tags.
15. Added proper closing tags for all elements."}

parsed.explanation:
1. Added XML declaration and root element `<ADVERTISING_ITEM>` to ensure proper XML structure.
2. Fixed the faulty tag `<PRICE>` to `<PRICE>` in the 4th book entry.
3. Corrected the formatting of the `<FORMAT>` tags to standardize abbreviations (e.g., '4t' to '4to').
4. Added missing `<AUTHOR>` tag for the first book entry.
5. Added missing `<SELLER>` section to include the seller's name.
6. Added missing `<BOOKS>` and `<BOUND_BOOKS>` sections to categorize books.
7. Corrected the special characters (e.g., 'ü' and 'ü' to 'ü' and 'ü').
8. Corrected the title 'Valer. Mar-' to 'Valerius Maro Amstelaeus'.
9. Corrected the title 'Homen Hias & Odyfl.' to 'Homerus: Ilias & Odyssee'.
10. Corrected 'VOLUME' tag for the 6th book entry to '6. Stück complet'.
11. Corrected 'VOLUME' tag for the 13th book entry to '4. Tom.'
12. Corrected 'VOLUME' tag for the 14th book entry to '2. Tom.'
13. Corrected 'VOLUME' tag for the 15th book entry to '1ter Tom.'
14. Standardized the abbreviations in the `<FORMAT>` tags.
15. Added proper closing tags for all elements.
